name: Tablet of Scriptures
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%, and HP Recovery +[StateArg1]%. At the end of odd turns, the wielder's Crit. Rate + [StateArg2]%, gaining [StateArg3] Aliemus; at the end of even turns, the wielder's Crit. DMG increases by [StateArg2]%, gaining [StateArg4] Keyflare. If the current realm is {Caro}, the maximum accumulation of the {Crimson Furnace} is increased by [StateArg5]%.
